name: canopyops
description: Evidence-bounded decision support for legal cannabis cultivation operations.

interface.shortDescription: Cannabis crop plans, diagnostics, and operating records.
interface.longDescription: Turn facility data, crop observations, logs, and constraints into evidence-bounded plans, incident workups, calculations, harvest reviews, and auditable records for legal cannabis cultivation.
defaultPrompt: Build a cannabis crop plan from this room, cultivar, and facility profile.
Diagnose this crop or root-zone incident from my logs and observations.
Review this batch for harvest readiness and document the decision.
